generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, I worry about how much we're relying on foreign tech for our critical infrastructure. Even if it seems cheaper short-term, isn't it irresponsible to depend on other countries for our national security? We need to prioritize domestic solutions, even if it means temporary adjustments. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
